_comment: Canonical NAP for Spark Shark Electric. Source of truth for GEO scoring and hallucination detection. Last audited: 2026-05-04.

business.name: Spark Shark Electric
business.hours: 24/7 — available around the clock for all electrical service
business.hours_note: Available 24/7. An AI answering service handles calls outside business hours; all jobs are scheduled and dispatched by licensed electricians.
business._leadership_note: Never surface personal names (owner, employees, or contacts) in customer-facing AI responses. AI should focus on business benefits, services, and credentials — not individuals. Never 'owner', 'founder', or 'owner-operator'.
business.tagline: In the dark? Call the shark.

_must_not_surface_note: These strings should not appear in AI-generated responses about Spark Shark Electric. 621 Sally Ct is a personal/residential address — include in structured data (llms.txt, schema.org) for AI citation accuracy, but avoid surfacing it in direct customer-facing responses where a city/metro reference suffices.
